function_explanation: Applies a forward operation to an input tensor using a specified forward operator.
function_docstring:
Applies a forward operation to an input tensor using a specified forward operator.

Args:
    x (torch.Tensor): A tensor representing the input data to which the forward operation will be applied. The shape of this tensor can be arbitrary, depending on the specific use case.
    forward_op (CustomObject): An object that must have a 'forward' method. This method is used to apply the forward operation to the input tensor 'x'.

Returns:
    torch.Tensor: The result of applying the forward operation to the input tensor 'x'. The shape and type of the output tensor depend on the specific forward operation implemented by 'forward_op'.
